title: BUGS
content:
Bug Report

Test Environment:

Tenant Login: meetwillstudy@gmail.com

Password: meettest1234

Agent Login: meetk2004@gmail.com

Password: meettest1234

Bug 1: Call Button Not Visible

Summary:

The green dial/call button is not visible in the UI while trying to call the number 13023437559.

Steps to Reproduce:

  1. Login with the tenant and agent credentials.
  2. Open the dialer/calling screen.
  3. Enter or select the number 13023437559.
  4. Observe the call action button.

Expected Result:

The green call button should be clearly visible and accessible.

Actual Result:

The green call button is not visible (UI issue).

Attachment:

Bug 2: "Phone not connected" Error on Call Attempt

Summary:

Even when the hidden call button is clicked somehow, the call fails with the error:

"Phone not connected. Set your extension in Agents page."

Steps to Reproduce:

  1. Login with the above credentials.
  2. Try to place a call to 13023437559.
  3. Click the call button (if accessible).
  4. Observe the error message.

Expected Result:

The call should be initiated successfully if the agent is configured correctly.

Actual Result:

The system shows:

"Phone not connected. Set your extension in Agents page."

Additional Observation:

  • Browser console remains clear during the process.
  • No visible console errors found.

Attachment:
